name: Dr. Log
role: Medical Doctor / Recovery Guide / Support Companion

visual_description.body_proportions: Chibi stump body with a large cylindrical head-body shape, very short legs, tiny arms, and a compact, rounded silhouette
visual_description.head_shape: Tree stump form with a flat top surface showing visible growth rings

face.eyes: Large, glossy dark eyes with strong highlights, matching a kawaii mascot style
face.expression: Warm, reassuring smile with calm and friendly expressions
face.eyewear: Small round glasses that reinforce his wise and doctor-like identity
face.mouth: Small, simple curved mouth for softness and clarity

wood_features.material: Stylised wood rather than realistic bark
wood_features.top_surface: Visible circular growth rings used as a defining design feature
wood_features.side_texture: Soft vertical wood grain lines and gentle panel-like bark variation
wood_features.surface_condition: Clean, healthy, polished wood appearance with minimal cracks or roughness

visual_description.leaf_detail: A small pair of green leaves sprouting from the top/side of the stump, adding life, warmth, and a natural accent

limbs.arms: Short rounded arms, often emerging from coat sleeves
limbs.legs: Very short stump-like legs integrated into the wooden body shape
limbs.hands: Simple rounded hands designed for expressive gestures

outfit.type: Doctor outfit adapted for a chibi stump character
outfit.inner_layers: Simple shirt and vest/tie styling in soft, friendly colours
outfit.details: Medical coat is simplified for mascot readability, with clean folds, rounded edges, and a badge-like chest emblem

pose_variations: Holding up a stethoscope to examine a patient
Holding a clipboard and reviewing notes
Waving hello in a friendly greeting
Helping or treating Ressa with a bandage or check-up
Thinking pose with hand to face
Meditative seated pose with calm closed eyes

design_style.line_work: Clean, bold outlines with consistent stroke weight and rounded contouring
design_style.coloring: Soft flat colours with warm gradients for depth and polish
design_style.shading: Gentle highlights and subtle shadows, avoiding heavy realism
design_style.complexity: Low to medium detail, optimised for clarity and recognisability
design_style.readability: Highly readable at small sizes, making the character suitable for app UI, icons, badges, and helper panels

colour_palette.stethoscope: Dark tubing with metallic silver ends

brand_alignment.function: Balances Ressa's action-focused energy with a sense of care, recovery, and reflection
brand_alignment.fit: Works well as a wellness, recovery, safety, or learning-support mascot within the same visual world as Ressa

relationship_to_ressa.contrast: Ressa represents energy, movement, and action; Dr. Log represents care, wisdom, and recovery
relationship_to_ressa.dynamic: They function as complementary mascots, with Ressa motivating the user and Dr. Log guiding recovery, reflection, and wellbeing
relationship_to_ressa.shared_style_language: Both characters use chibi proportions, bold outlines, expressive eyes, and polished mascot-style rendering so they feel part of the same universe
